nasb.text: The Lord nullifies the counsel of the nations; He frustrates the plans of the peoples.

esv.text: The Lord  brings the counsel of the nations to nothing; he frustrates the plans of the peoples.

cnv.text: 耶和華破壞列國的謀略， 使萬民的計劃挫敗。

ccb.text: 祂挫败列国的谋算， 拦阻列邦的计划。

csbs.text: 耶和华破坏列国的谋略， 挫败万民的意念。
